reproducibility.coverage_policy: coverage_status is derived only from review status and conflict/drift state: unreviewed official source facts are 'conditional', facts with connector drift signals are 'unsupported', conflicting facts are 'data_conflict'. Connector confidence is NEVER mapped to a coverage label and no unreviewed fact is 'verified' (PRD section 12).
